customer_anxiety_profile: Low expressed anxiety on this call, but behavioral history (prior no-show) suggests fragility. Customer is cooperative and has residual interest — they called back — but has not re-engaged emotionally with the value proposition.

closer_should_know: Customer has a hard stop at 5:45 PM for track practice — the closer has 45 minutes, not 60.
